---
name: Factual correction
description: Report a factual, bibliographic, attribution, date, or accessibility correction
title: "Correction: "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Location

Identify the file, section, paragraph, table row, or website element.

## Current statement

Quote only the minimum text necessary to identify the issue.

## Proposed correction

State the corrected wording or behavior.

## Evidence

Provide primary sources, repository evidence, versioned records, or reproducible steps. Distinguish first-person testimony from independently verifiable evidence.

## Consequence

Explain whether this changes interpretation, attribution, accessibility, publication metadata, or a C0–C5 claim state.

## Checklist

- [ ] I identified the exact location.
- [ ] I supplied evidence or reproducible steps.
- [ ] I did not include private credentials, protected health information, or unrelated personal data.
